n: Book 7, Chapter 1: The Land of the Elf-queen

steps.t: Nona is by the ladder down from the flets on which stand the House of Celeborn. Nona is waiting for you to show her around Caras Galadhon.
Now that Galadriel has given permission for Nona to explore Caras Galadhon, you should bring her to see several of its notable locations: Celúrlin, th…
Having shown Nona around Caras Galadhon, you should now speak with Galadriel in her garden as she requested.
